name: FGI Industries Ltd. Warrant
summary: FGI Industries Ltd. designs, manufactures, and distributes kitchen and bath products. Its products include shower enclosures, shower doors, acrylic bath and shower systems, vanities, sinks, faucets, and other accessories for residential and commercial markets, with its headquarters in Roseland, New Jersey. The company offers its products through home centers, wholesalers, distributors, and retailers.
